item.title: Find some laughs in the next 48 hours
item.description:
Show is Make Some Noise
Akin to Who's Line is it Anyways
Collegehumor went under and was rebiethed as Dropout
Dropout is 6$ a month with DND shows, nerd trivia, comedy
Free episodes also on youtube
Comedy breeds antifragility in the face of conflict
Find a reason to laugh
Whole lotta people gonna be sad this week, and whole lotta people gonna be glad
Cheers all
item.dc:creator: StellaMatutina

item.title: Grandpa just turned 100. He is a veteran of three wars and still fits in his uniform!
item.description:
I uploaded this picture of Grandpa Dick four years ago. It was the height of Covid and he had just gotten in trouble from his retirement home because he had snuck out for a drink on his 96th birthday with a friend. He had gotten “grounded” and very nearly missed his Veterans Day celebration because of the quarantine. Many people expressed a wish to write him letters at the time to wish him a happy Veterans Day, and in light of his 100th birthday (today! November 4th) and another upcoming Veterans Day, I thought it would be nice to set up an email account for him for anyone inclined to send some positivity his way. He does not want any physical gifts this year, but I think the best gift he could receive is some positive recognition. He has served in WWII, the Korean War, and Vietnam. I’ve created an email for him at: DickMoore1924@gmail.com But here’s more about Grandpa:
He continues to wear his uniform for special occasions - here he is last May, breaking out the fancy duds
Here he is outfitting my nephew Brady with his hat.
Grandpa Dick grew up in Spokane, WA. (This is him when he was in high school)
(Pictured far left, front row) Grandpa was featured in his local newspaper years ago: A veteran of three wars on three continents — he was a controller in the U.S. air defense system in Alaska during the Korean War — Moore looks back on those years without sentimentality. He shouldn’t have survived the first one, he says, and can’t see why he was even in the third. We shouldn’t have been in Vietnam in the first place,” Moore said last week at the Missoula Senior Center, his home away from home. “It was well-known you don’t fight a ground war over in the jungle. Way back in WWII we knew that.” Moore makes no claim to heroism, and says what commendation medals he received weren’t for putting his life in danger, though surely it was many times. Those awards were packed up with the aviator helmet and sent to Seattle. There, his son Rich has set aside a room for his father’s memorabilia.
(A photo displayed at his assisted living honoring his service) Included in the same article is a story recalled by Grandpa’s son Richard: Rich was 60 at the time and recalled an incident on vacation from 50 years earlier. The family of four, including Moore’s late first wife Louise, was driving through Kansas at lunch time. “I think we were pretty hungry and didn’t have a lot of choices out on the plains. You pulled into a restaurant, and we saw a sign on the front door or window. It said, ‘Coloreds served in paper bags at the back door,’ or something even worse. I don’t even remember you turning off the engine. You and Mom decided we could wait a bit longer to eat, and we turned around and left that restaurant behind. Thank you for the example.”
I asked him what the secret to a long life is and this was his answer. He follows this up with another secret, “Always chase after women, but never catch them”
Grandpa has stayed very active throughout the years. He took three different river trips in his 90’s visiting the Green River in CO, the Rogue River in OR, and most recently the Salmon River in ID. He has always loved golfing but hasn’t gone as much in recent years. However, he continues to stay busy and goes bowling every Thursday. Thank you for reading about my amazing grandfather!
item.dc:creator: TessaDanger

item.title: Images of Note: pained shallow breaths
item.description:
oh no
This is what looking at my phone when someone PINGS ME AT 2AM is like.
Every statue pfp haver has the worst opinions.
D:
This is me. Just me. Please kill me
I will never forgive the Pokemon company for giving her an English Accent in that game. Also the Male trainer in that game has a Yorkshire accent, I will not be taking notes.
THIS IS WHAT GOING SHOPPING WITHOUT HEADPHONES.
Wait til they hear what we do to Pizzas in Scotland
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
kronch
run
REMOVE HIS BALLS
JUST READ MY FUCKING CV YOU FUCKING LUMPS OF FUCK!
imgur when I post something horse related.
me when I'm in a Funk™ and my mum comes to check up on me.
more like 4pm in Scotland in December. THERE'S A FUCKING REASON THE WORDS FOR "DECEMBER" AND "DARKNESS" ARE THE SAME IN GAIDHLIG!
HELL YEAH!
https://imgur.com/gallery/public-service-announcement-americans-nIgWd93
Protip: "Woke" is what the right call things now that they would've called "Degenerate" in the past, but they can't now because if they did, people will remember back to their History Classes.
This is how I react
E G G
My nearest tall ship is in Glasgow.
ferg
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Important post: https://imgur.com/gallery/public-service-announcement-americans-nIgWd93 Go vote, don't fuck this up America, or else I will do the following: 1. Make the US Ambassador to the UK Eat Beans on Toast, Live on TV. 2. Start a business selling American Biscuits as "Savory Breakfast Scones". 3. Start Pronouncing Pittsburgh like "Edinburgh". 4. Make Lackluster "Britishised" versions of American Sitcoms that are inexplicably popular in the UK. First Modern Family. 5. Introduce the Bostonians to Buckfast, telling them the Irish like it. You fuckers in Mass will not stand a chance. 6. Teach Folkpunk bands how to play Bagpipes. 7. Take back John Oliver and give you back James Corden *and* Piers Morgan. 8. Start a company to send all the Holiday makers who would've otherwise gone to Benidorm to Florida, not just to give the Spaniards a break after the floods, but to Punish Florida. 9. Give New Yorkers Vuvuzelas. 10. Tell the rest of the world about Rocky Mountain Oysters. As I said, DON'T FUCK THIS UP!

man that looks good

what if we kissed while one of us was on it
no need to brag
mmm hmm
mmm hmm
Ruth?
don't listen to this guy. it's totally fine
happens all the time if there's a music or sports category
we've all done this
i guess
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Doing my part. My spiteful, justified, angry part.
item.description: Jokes aside, I am going to vote today. I took the day off work so I could vote and I can escort anyone inside that feels uncomfortable. I live in Kentucky and in my town, we have had a lot of voter intimidation issues here. Four years ago, the polling location at our library had 5 pickup trucks outside with a dozen guys with guns flying trump flags to try and scare away people. The police did nothing about it because they were technically not violating any laws. So this year, me and some friends are going to be walking anyone in that is worried about the magats and their bullshit.

item.title: No fear. Vote.
item.description: Source: https://redd.it/1gjl4i4 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO

item.title: Glory to you and your identity
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Did I Just Get Threatened?
item.description: This feels like a clear case of voter intimidation. It's vague, yes, but the undertones are there. I contacted the Indiana GOP to verify that it was real and, yes, it's real. Some people, they told me, have been misconstruing it: You see, it only refers to whether you voted or not being public, not who you voted for. How silly of me to misconstrue someone telling me that my family will know whether I voted for Trump or not as being threatening. Edit: I've sent it to the Indiana ACLU and contacted my local news sources about it.
item.dc:creator: Luriden

item.title: When your worst fear comes true
item.description: My team has tried to prank me many times and many times I’ve foiled their devious little plans….Then I walk into our conference room Halloween. After about 5 minutes of uncontrollable laughter they all broke into “Character” and started doing their impressions of me…..I haven’t laughed that hard ever….it was a day for the ages. I hope everyone who’s in leadership can hit the lottery like I did with my team. Edit - I’m back row center.
item.dc:creator: Usernamemustbemorethan4characters
